payload.text:
MORNING_STANDUP_V3: Generate and write the daily stand-up HTML.

Run: bash /Users/ainchorsangiefpl/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/generate-standup.sh

The script reads state files, builds the 8-section stand-up HTML, and pipes it through cron-write.sh to ~/.openclaw/canvas/documents/standup-daily/index.html.

Do NOT use the write tool. No reply needed unless the script exits non-zero.

If idempotency blocks a re-run, set STANDUP_FORCE=1 in the environment before invoking.
